steps.title: Locate the stated reason
steps.content: The text says Morales is relatively obscure in the United States and directly gives a cause: the enormous popularity of peers Clara Navarro and Mateo Ruiz. Their popularity leads audiences to overlook Morales and other high-quality Mexican artists from the period.

steps.title: Reject invented details
steps.content: Choice B invents gallery-display history and reverses the attention pattern. Choice C invents shared subjects and different techniques. Choice D invents low production and gallery scarcity. The remaining choice states that Morales deserves more recognition but is overshadowed by Navarro and Ruiz drawing public attention. The answer is A.
